description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a rectangular, fenced plot of green lawn, featuring a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The structure is primarily composed of white and gray materials, with large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto patios and a pool area. The front facade is defined by a covered entryway and landscaped garden beds, while the rear showcases an expansive terrace and a rectangular swimming pool. The property is surrounded by a low hedge and includes several ornamental trees and shrubs, adding to its suburban appeal. The building appears to be single-story with a partial second-floor section, likely for additional living space or a rooftop terrace. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, patios, and a pool, set in a landscaped, fenced yard. The design features clean lines, white and gray surfaces, and a mix of open and covered outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and landscaped garden beds with a hedge boundary.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large terrace, swimming pool, and multiple glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool, patio area, and extensive use of glass for natural light and outdoor access.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the partial second story, additional patio space, and more ornamental trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
